mapper.select: SELECT * FROM contract_performance WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_performance (project_id, customer_agency, contract_name, business_amount, supply_type, payment_rate, contract_amount, completion_date, business_period, category_l1, category_l2, category_l3, memo) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{customerAgency}, #{contractName}, #{businessAmount}, #{supplyType}, #{paymentRate}, #{contractAmount}, #{completionDate}, #{businessPeriod}, #{categoryL1}, #{categoryL2}, #{categoryL3}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_performance SET customer_agency = #{customerAgency}, contract_name = #{contractName}, business_amount = #{businessAmount}, supply_type = #{supplyType}, payment_rate = #{paymentRate}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, completion_date = #{completionDate}, business_period = #{businessPeriod}, category_l1 = #{categoryL1}, category_l2 = #{categoryL2}, category_l3 = #{categoryL3}, memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM contract_performance WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
